title: M23 Lib
description: This lib adds some functions and is under testing
body:
This mod is a library mod that does not affect gameplay content.

Adds a feature for sending item data between the server and client for block entities, fixing incorrect item rendering for block entities.

Adds a feature allowing items to preserve or consume durability when crafted in a Crafting Table, and fixes the item duplication bug caused by this.Durability consumption can also be reduced using the Unbreaking enchantment during crafting (optional).

Adds a feature to select recipes based on the block.

Adds some utility classes.

Adds some non-static methods.

这个mod是一个前置mod，不影响游戏内容。

添加了一个用于方块实体服务端与客户端发送物品数据的功能，解决方块实体物品渲染不正确的问题。

添加了让物品在工作台中合成时能够保留或消耗耐久的功能，并修复了由此带来的无限刷物品的bug，合成时还可以使用耐久附魔减少耐久消耗（可选）。

添加了一个能够根据方块来选择配方的功能。

添加了一些工具类。

添加了一些非静态方法。
